entry.title: No Backend Services Found API_TASK_SPI_REPLICATION
entry.content:
I am getting this
No Backend Services Found

when trying to add API_TASK_SPI_REPLICATION with tcode /n/IWFND/MAINT_SERVICES to activate in the "Activate and Maintain Services" .

I have tried everything and with all System Alias

Tried this /n/iwbep/reg_service but still cant add this service.
Does it need to be added when the system was provisioned?
Am I missing something?

Thanks for any help.

Ger

entry.title: SAP IDCNAR AR/AGING REPORT ISSUE
entry.content:
When trying to run tcode idcnar in dialog mode whith customer account field empty and chosing company code it prompt for a user and password and stay blocked even when entering a user and password the popup remain blocked.

When choosing a customer account or multiple ones it work fine also when running it in background it work and generate the result in the spool of the job.

secstore ok

authorizations of the user ok

all rfc checked

any help please

entry.title: Re: OData service unable to pass MD parameter
entry.content:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_INTEGRATED_BUSINESS_PLANNING/da797ae2bf6246d58abd417f24915d55/45a6271e272d4accacc0139632450771.html     This help document says /IBP/EXTRACT_ODATA_SRV was designed for  SAP Analytics Cloud.   For PowerBI and other application use SAP_COM_0720 and /IBP/PLANNING_DATA_API_SRV for key figures and IBP/MASTER_DATA_API_SRV for master data.  

You must set up SAP_COM_0720 similar to how you configured SAP_COM_0143.  But SAP_COM_0720 needs the additional global parameter RELEVANT_MDT_FOR_MD_API.  It can be set using wild cards like ???*,???* where ??? are the prefixes for you different planning areas master data types.  Or you can list each full name of the master data type to limit it to just a few master data types.

Use the link you get from the communication arrangement for ..../IBP/MASTER_DATA_API_SRV and you will get a list of all the master data tables that match the RELEVANT_MDT_FOR_MD_API.   Pick the ones you want and then transform the data.

For key figure data type a query like

..IBP/PLANNING_DATA_API_SRV/CBS4P700?$select=PRDID,LOCID,PERIODID3_TSTAMP,KEYFIGURE1,KEYFIGURE2, etc..  

You can use relative time filter too like

&$filter= PERIODID3_REL ge 0 and PERIODID3_REL le 5 and PRDID eq 'xxxxx'

entry.title: I have added custom object under multiprovider but it's not showing up in BEx query designer
entry.content:
I have added custom object under multiprovider 

but it's not showing up in BEd query designer for drag and drop. 

Am I missing anything ?

entry.title: Re: Schedule Inbound Delivery Creation
entry.content: is there is a way on the schedule inbound delivery creation to set the range vs the deilvery date?

entry.title: Re: How to call API S/4Hana Public Cloud From SAP Cloud I...
entry.content:
Hello Mark. Please check if you have Set up API credentials In the SAP Cloud Integration, set up API credentials by referring to the endpoint URL and OAuth details provided in the communication arrangement. Develop an integration package: This package should be with integration flow, where you specify the API endpoint and credentials. Learn more with Integration Suite  documentation

Integrating SAP Integration Suite with Remote Systems 

You can learn more with Blog that shows steps . 

Refer to note to check if you have any special characters 3400580 - Some Cloud Integration OData API calls fail  which need to covert invalid characters into %HH format. and collection FAQ 2524719 - FAQ: Cloud Integration/Integration Suite

 

Hope this helps

Thanks

entry.title: Re: No database credentials provided in CAPM
entry.content: Simple check with the HANA cloud instances started or not . if not then go and start HANA DB instances from SAP BTP subaccount and related spaces(DEV, QA) of your instances then SAP HANA cloud or  SAP HANA Cloud Central Then run command cds watch --profile hybrid into BAS terminal of you project folder.

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP Error - No database credentials provided
entry.content: Simple check with the HANA cloud instances started or not . if not then go and start HANA DB instances from SAP BTP subaccount and related spaces(DEV, QA) of your instances then SAP HANA cloud or  SAP HANA Cloud Central Then run command cds watch --profile hybrid into BAS terminal of you project folder.

entry.title: Inbound delivery creation EWM
entry.content:
I can schedule outbound delivery with schedule outbound delivery creation (sales order) and set the  dleivery creation daty (dyn) next 14 days and the outbound will create.

I can not however seem to get inbound to create. I have tried schdule delivery creation app using creation for purchase order and nothing happens. I have tried app schedule inbound delivery creation and selected all three plants and can only set the date to 01/01/2099 as you can not set the delivery date To (dyn) in this app. 

 

What is best practice to schedule the inbound dleivery coming into ewm?

entry.title: Cannot separate cost for activity type
entry.content:
There are 2 activity types, one is Testing, the other is Set Up, and they are using the same cost element group. We want to set the proportion of cost element group for Testing is 70%, while Set up is 30%, but this setting cannot be realized. Is it required to use other function?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Cannot separate cost for activity type
entry.content:
Yes, this can be achieved.

You can do manually splitting or allocation from the original account to multiple accounts.

Then you can configure the target accounts into the splitting structure setting. Then the actual cost rate calculation will be done accordingly.

entry.title: Re: Can we add more decimal places for invoices and quantities in SAP Public Cloud?
entry.content: Please remove tags other than SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales.

entry.title: How to Set Up Job & Automation Monitoring for SAP S4 HANA Cloud Private Edition?
entry.content:
Hello,

How to Set Up Job & Automation Monitoring for SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Private Edition?

Best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to Set Up Job & Automation Monitoring for SAP S4...
entry.content:
Hello,

Will be necessary to register the system on Landscape Management as described on guide below and Configure the PUSH Data Provider for Job & Automation Monitoring:

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition

Ensure the system have all prerequisites and required roles to perform this action. 

 

Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Withholding Tax in Manage Supplier Line Items

entry.title: Re: Zipping multiple files from SFTP to SFTP in one folder
entry.content:
Hi Shreyas,

In my scenario, I read two different ".csv" files using SFTP-poll, merged them into a single file, and sent a single .zip to ARIBA.

I later set the file name with a content-modifier.

Try using the Sequential-Multicast
I hope this helps you.

Best regards 🖖🏻

entry.title: Re: Password change by BAPI_USER_CHANGE
entry.content:
Hello Jan,

Here is my code...

Unlock user can be done without any problem from CUA central system. I specified target system in code by Logical system ( <SID>CLNTxxx ). Even after specified it changing password can not ne done from CUA central system. But password of Target user in CUA central system was updated. That means changes on users in central system was not synchronized to users on child system. There are similar case in SAP community. But I could not find what is true.


* User unlock *

        CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_USER_UNLOCK'

          EXPORTING

            USERNAME  = WA-BNAME

            TABLES

            RETURN    = WK_RETURN.

* Password Change *

        CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_USER_CHANGE' destination 'Q01CLNT500'

          EXPORTING

            USERNAME  = WA-BNAME

            PASSWORD  = '87654321'

            PASSWORDX = 'X'

          TABLES

            RETURN    = WK_RETURN.

        COMMIT WORK.

entry.title: Czech Republic's Currency
entry.content:
Hi everyone, I am joining project which is related to Czech Republic and now I am quite confused about Czech Republic's currency. Please help me clear below questions. 

1) About company code currency, now Czech's company code is automatically assigned to CZK (country currency), but I heard that Czech is soon about to use EUR as their official currency beside CZK. So in this case, Czech's company code will be automatically assigned to EUR or we can choose between CZK and EUR? When SAP will make the change in the system if Czech officially use EUR as their currency? 

2) About Functional currency, I found the article like this Functional currency in Czech accounting - BDO , I want to use EUR as functional currency, so Tax report might be submitted in EUR? What happen in case that I already set functional currency is EUR but in the future, company code must be changed to EUR? 

Please help me. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to execute an external navigation with parameter from prior bound action in Fiori Elements
entry.content:
My intent is to trigger an external navigation following a successful execution of a bound action. That external navigation should use the return (UUID) of the action as a parameter of the external navigation.

I have tried to approach this problems from varying angles, but always seem to run into problems that either the standard fiori elements functions don't respond as their are supposed to (based on examples I can find in documentations) or the starting points being created by the Fiori tools in VS Code are incorrect. 

To make it easier to understand I have created a repo with three branches. Each branch contains one approach/example of what I tried but in either example when using the standard SAP starting points my model reference or events supposedly passed in at runtime come back undefined. 

What am I missing? How would you solve it???

@gregorw , @vobu , @jhodel18  

The repo for reproduction of the problem

https://github.com/MartinStenzig/sap-fe-bug-1

  1. Clone the repo
  2. Change to the /sap-fe-bug-1 directory
  3. Run npm start
  4. Navigate to http://localhost:4004/def/webapp/index.html

Approach 1

The first idea is to use:

  1. An annotation (and manifest.json) based approach to trigger the server side, bound action. This works well.
  2. Some sort of handler that
    1. receives the UUID for from the successful action and uses it to
    2. trigger the external navigation with the received UUID as parameter

To that end I tried to create a Controller extensions for single page.

 

 

To show the root problem to make progress, I assed the one line that shows oModel being undefined.... and I have not even added anything yet.

sap.ui.define(['sap/ui/core/mvc/ControllerExtension'], function (ControllerExtension) {
	'use strict';

	return ControllerExtension.extend('riz.synch.def.ext.controller.Appr1', {
		// this section allows to extend lifecycle hooks or hooks provided by Fiori elements
		override: {
			/**
             * Called when a controller is instantiated and its View controls (if available) are already created.
             * Can be used to modify the View before it is displayed, to bind event handlers and do other one-time initialization.
             * @memberOf riz.synch.def.ext.controller.Appr1
             */
			onInit: function () {
				// you can access the Fiori elements extensionAPI via this.base.getExtensionAPI
				var oModel = this.base.getExtensionAPI().getModel();

				// !!! ONLY ADDED this line to the original code !!!
				if (!oModel) {
					alert('Model not found')
				}

			}
		}
	});
});
 

To reproduce the first issue, you can open up the application url http://localhost:4004/def/webapp/index.html and receive the error message that the Model was not found.

Approach 2

The second idea is similar to the first one:

  1. An annotation (and manifest.json) based approach to trigger the server side, bound action. This works well.
  2. Some sort of handler that
    1. receives the UUID for from the successful action and uses it to
    2. trigger the external navigation with the received UUID as parameter

To that end I tried to create a Controller extensions for all ListReport Pages.

The implementation of the code is as before (only show the added lines in this example):

	// !!! ONLY ADDED this line to the original code !!!
				if (!oModel) {
					alert('Model not found')
				}
 

To reproduce the first issue, you can open up the application url http://localhost:4004/def/webapp/index.html and receive the error message that the Model was not found.

The problem seems to be the same. oModel is undefined

Approach 3

The third idea is to replace the whole thing with a custom action handler. I used the following parameters:

 

 

The ActionHandlers.js file was defaulted with the starting point. All I did was add a console.log output.

sap.ui.define([
    "sap/m/MessageToast"
], function(MessageToast) {
    'use strict';

    return {
        onTrigActionAndNav: function(oEvent) {
            MessageToast.show("Custom handler invoked.");

            // !!! ONLY ADDED THE FOLLOWING LINE !!!
            console.log("Custom handler invoked.", oEvent);
        }
    };
});
 

When I check the Google Chrome console I receive Custom handler invoked. undefined

Without a proper bound event I don't seem to be able to use any of the examples I can find at present.

entry.title: Re: Mass Export of Performance Forms in SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi ShaunWhite,

You may consider using Archive and Print to export form PDF version in bulk.
For more details related to this feature, please check the following KBA:
2087337 - How to Create an Archive, Retrieve an Archive and Print Documents - BizX Platform

BR,
Yilin

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process Automation: Consume Integration Flows from SAP Integration Suite as Actions
entry.content:
@Karthik-Thiru 

Hello.

I appreciate your nice blog.

I'm interested in the connection between Integration Suite and Build Process Automation.

So I deployed Integration Flow same as yours and set up destination on BTP as instructed this help.

 

The destination configuration is as follows.

 

  • DesignTimeDestinations

Instance

 

 

  • RuntimeDestination

instance

However when tried to refer the integration flow from BPA > Connectors >  Actions > Choose an API Source > Integration Suite > Integration Flow, following error is displayed.

Error message

Failed to fetch the iFlow artifacts : The destination tried to provide authorization tokens but failed in all cases. This is most likely due to misconfiguration. Original error messages: Failed to create SSL connection

 

I also tried to add properties and change Authentication method but it didn't help.

 

I'm sorry to bother you but could you possibly share your destinations, please?

 

Actually I can refer Integration Flow from Choose an API Source > API Specifications > Build from Scratch and it works.

However I could chose only Basic authentication and this security is safe enough.

Sorry for long question but I'd appreciate if you could reply.

entry.title: Re: What are the best practices for accessing files on an SAP S/4HANA system from SAP Cloud Integrat
entry.content:
Hi Mustafa,
The best approach is to expose the files on your S/4HANA (OP or Cloud Private Edition) via the SFTP server.
This solution allows S/4HANA to write the file using AL11 mapped directories and allows BTP Cloud Integration to connect using SAP Cloud Connector.

The second option will need custom code, if even possible to retrieve the file with the correct format and encoding (imagine a payment or other type of file where every character matters). Why complicate things with SAP printing capabilities?
In such a case where you are contemplating writing custom code, you can request a custom remote function module that, when called, retrieves the files from the specific directory and responds with the file in either STRING or BASE64, the FM can be called directly or through the Web Services Runtime (SRT).

The third option, which is SAP Edge Integration Cell using FILE ADAPTER, is an unknown as we don't know all the capabilities it will provide, but remember, EIC is running on a K8s cluster, so most likely, you will need to "Export NFS Shares", "Install NFS Client on K8s Nodes", "Create PV and PVC and mount to the Pods", on top of that consider Network Policies, control access between NFS server and the K8s cluster, everything running in managed environments, I am sure it will work, but it won't be "next-next-finish" wizard. (Honest opinion: I am looking forward to the EIC solution).

Best regards 🖖🏻

entry.title: Re: Running Revenue Recognition (EPMFC) in Higher WBS level
entry.content: Hello, There should be only one billing element under one project. And that one should be assigned with RA key. You can only revalue the one with RA key. BR, Owen

entry.title: Re: What is the name of the CDS that contains "Inventory Price" data in Public Cloud for d
entry.content: Added Finance tag, please remove tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

entry.title: Re: What is the name of the CDS that contains "Inventory...
entry.content:
Hello,

There are multiple posts asking the same question.

The answer unfortunately is negative.

There is currently no such CDS view. This is due to current design and roadmap.

Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: How to add a new Entity & navigation property to standard cds: A_PurchaseContract?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am able to extend the CDS A_PurchaseContract with few loose field.  And this is working fine and getting visible on the table also.  Below is the cds code: 

 

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewAppendName: 'ZMMPURCEXT1'
@EndUserText.label: 'ZMM_PURC_EXT'
extend view A_PurchaseContract with ZMM_PURC_EXT 
association [1..1] to ZCDS_PURCHASEHEADER_LONGTEXT2 as _LongText
  on _LongText.PurchaseContract is not null
{
  _LongText.TextId ,
  _LongText.LongText
}

 

 

 

But, I need to extend the CDS A_PurchaseContract with a new EntitySet with the structure under a new Navigation Name: HdrText

 

 

 

HdrText:  [{
                LongTextId(C3),
                LongText(C50)
        }]

 

Kindly share the step-by-step approach on this.

Note: The class for your reference are:

* The main API is: API_PURCHASECONTRACT_SRV

 

Service: API_PURCHASECONTRACT_SRV
Classes: CL_API_PURCHASECONTRAC_DPC_EXT
         CL_API_PURCHASECONTRAC_MPC_EXT

 

Thanks,

Ramani Nagarajan

entry.title: Re: How to add a new Entity & navigation property to standard cds: A_PurchaseContract?
entry.content: ****The requirement is little urgent please.

entry.title: Re: No funds center entered/derived in item XXXXXX (Error Message: FI313
entry.content:
Hi i am unable to post transaction in Tcode-FBCJ ,

No funds center entered/derived in item 00001 (MG01/16500001/)

Message no. FI313

Diagnosis

The Funds Management component is activated in company code MG01. Consequently, a funds center needs to be entered manually or derived by the system.

To derive a funds center, you can use the following elements: Company code MG01 and account 16500001, or CO object .

Procedure

Enter a funds center or do one of the following to ensure that the system can derive the funds center from the assignments available:

  • Assign a funds center in the commitment item master record
  • Assign a funds center to the CO object

help me solve this issue all the fund center related config is there!..

Thankyou in advance....

entry.title: Re: Assessment Cycle
entry.content:
Hi,

You can use T code - FAGLGA31

If you are in latest releases of SAP S/4HANA you can also use Universal allocation.

 

Regards,

Gavin.

entry.title: Re: How to attach custom F4 Search help in Manage Customer Line Items(F0711)
entry.content:
Hi,

1. Create a VH CDS view for F4 search help.

2. Expose the above CDS view in your redefined the standard OData service.

3. Create metadata extension which @Metadata.layer: #CUSTOMER, in there to add VH annotation for the custom field.

(small question: why don`t you use the 'Custom Field' app to add a custom field to app?)

BRs,

Archer

entry.title: Re: Cost Center and Profit Center Budget

You can set this up in KE13

Refer below blog for details

Cost center and GL/Profit center budget uploads - SAP Community

 

Regards,

Gavin.

entry.title: Re: Display G/L balances in FS10N transaction based on co...
entry.content:
Hi,

You can create Fiscal year variant using OB29

And assign it to your company code using OB37.

 

Regards,

Gavin.

entry.title: Re: Unintended reinstall of SSAM app
entry.content:
I have occasionally run into this as well but usually with other files.  I am not sure if anti-virus is triggering it or something else.  We are still investigating for a better solution.

When I run into it I typically stop and relaunch my client from my terminal window and usually that helps.  Only running one client at a time also seems to help but none of this is really scientific.

entry.title: SAPUI5 and OData v4: 404 errors thrown after deleting an entity in detail page
entry.content:
Hi all, we have a requirement for 2 detail pages for each entity. When we click on a row item in the list page, we navigate to detail page 1. On detail page 1, we have another button to view detail page 2. Hence the routing hierarchy is list page -> detail page 1 -> detail page 2. For both detail pages, we bind the entity to the view based on the tutorials like such

private onRouteMatched(event) {
    this.entityId = event.getParameter('arguments').objectId;
    const entityPath = `/${RESULT_ENTITY_NAME}(${this.entityId})`;
    this.getView().bindElement({
      path: entityPath,
      events: {
        dataReceived: async (event) => {
          const params = event.getParameters();
          if (params.error && 'status' in params.error && params.error.status === 404) {
            await this.getRouter().getTargets().display('notFound');
          }
        },
      },
    });
  }

As you can see, we will navigate to a not found page if a 404 error is thrown. The code above is the same for both detail pages.

We have a delete button only on detail page 1 for deleting this entity. After delete we will navigate to the list page. The problem comes when the user is at detail page 1, enters detail page 2, presses back to go back to detail page 1, then presses delete. For some reason, this triggers a 404 error in the element binding in detail page 2 and we navigate to the not found page, even though we have navigated to the list page already. If we were to press delete the first time we are on detail page 1 (i.e. we never navigated to detail page 2), the delete works perfectly fine (we navigate to the list page properly and stay on it).

I think the issue is with the binding we are doing in both detail pages, but I'm not sure how to work around it.

Rajeev Uppal

entry.title: Re: SAC Table - 3 Dimension Rows are merged to 1 Row automatically without hierarchy?
entry.content: Is it a acquired model or a live BW model?

entry.title: Реферальний код OKX: 69809443 – максимальні переваги на 2024 рік
entry.content:
У 2024 році скористайтеся реферальним кодом OKX «69809443», щоб розблокувати бонусні переваги для нових користувачів у OKX: 10 000 доларів США та 50% дисконтної торгової комісії. OKX, заснована в 2017 році Джеєм Хао, визнана однією з найкращих у світі криптовалютних бірж, яка працює в США, Великобританії, Росії, Канаді, Кореї, Японії, Індії, Мальті та Сейшельських островах.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Що таке реферальний код OKX? У 2024 році рекомендований реферальний код OKX для отримання максимальних переваг – «69809443». Використовуйте цей код під час реєстрації, щоб отримати бонус у розмірі до 10 000 доларів США та комісію зі знижкою 50%. Почніть свою подорож із потенціалом отримати повний бонус за реєстрацію в розмірі $10 000 у USDT.

entry.title: Re: Connect Analysis for Office (AfO) with SAP Analytics...
entry.content:
Hi Eric,

SAC with AfO currently only support the classic account model. Therefore, you can't use models of the new model type (model with measures).

Just cross check once models that you are expecting to see in SAC for AFO are classic account models.

Best Regards,

Basavaraj

entry.title: Re: Connect Analysis for Office (AfO) with SAP Analytics...
entry.content:
Hi eric2357, 

    The list you see as attached only contains acquired model with type classic account model. The new model type is not support by AO yet. I guess that's why you only see two. 

  https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYSIS_OFFICE_CLOUD/b25c777a2c8c4e3da2f472cce24f289c/22dde04d4598450189afc33838c13575.html

Best regards, William

entry.title: How to Automatically Delete EC Alerts when Contract End Date is Emptied?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a business rule which creates EC alerts when a fixed term employee reaches contract end date.

The problem is that the alerts doesn't automatically get deleted when the contract end date value is emptied (when employee becomes permanent).

What is the possible workaround? It seems that the Alert.Delete Old Pending Alert Flag works only if there is a new alert to insert (e.g. new Contract End Date is entered) but not if Contract End Date is removed.

Thank you.

 

Kind regards,

Gem

entry.title: I need to send an invoice in both Excel and CSV formats via email.
entry.content:
Dear experts,

The current code snippet is sending e mail in xls format. Now the requirement is I need to send email in both Excel and CSV formats.

code:

"merging header and item rows
IF lv_header IS NOT INITIAL AND lv_item IS NOT INITIAL .
CONCATENATE lv_header cl_abap_char_utilities=>newline lv_item INTO lv_excel.
ENDIF.

"converting to binary
TRY.
cl_bcs_convert=>string_to_solix(
EXPORTING
iv_string = lv_excel
iv_codepage = '4103' "suitable for MS Excel, leave empty
iv_add_bom = 'X' "for other doc types
IMPORTING
et_solix = lt_binary_content ).
CATCH cx_bcs.
MESSAGE e005.
ENDTRY.

"add attchement
CALL METHOD lo_document->add_attachment
EXPORTING
i_attachment_type = 'xls'
i_attachment_subject = lv_subject
i_att_content_text = lt_cont_text
i_att_content_hex = lt_binary_content.

* add document to send request
CALL METHOD lo_send_request->set_document( lo_document ).

Please guide me how to do this or if you have any sample code for help.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: How can non released function module be used in SAP BTP.
entry.content: Thanks for your input. Seems we need to develop some custom objects keeping the public space in mind.

entry.title: Is it possible to switch the display of a dimension in a chart from ID to description using script?
entry.content: Is it possible to switch the display of a dimension in a chart from ID to description, or to show both ID and description, using scripting in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) using buttons?

entry.title: Assistance Required for Comparing same Column Values in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Community,


We are currently facing a challenge in comparing values within the same column in SAP Analytical Applications and model scripting in SAP Analytics Cloud. Specifically, we have a dataset with a column called "Vehicle Speed". Our requirement is to compare each value in this column with the subsequent value (i.e., the 1st value with the 2nd, the 2nd with the 3rd, and so on). Whenever a specified condition is met during these comparisons, we need to create an additional measure column to capture these instances as '1' or '0'.

Despite our efforts to implement this in SAC Analytical Applications and Model Scripting, we have not been successful.

Please find below image for data.

As the highlighted data increments from 0 to 20, we need to track instances where the next record is greater than or equal to 20. For this, we require an additional measure column to count such instances.


Kindly help me with above requirement.

Thanks,
Urvish

entry.title: BTP ABAP Fiori cross system intend based navigation
entry.content:
Hello,

how can it be achieved to navigate from a fiori app in BTP Abap runtime launchpad to a S4 system launchpad? 

There seems no option to pass another system in the intend based navigation annotations. Is the annotation  type: #WITH_URL the only solution here?

BR

But the compensation portlet is not updated with the revised compensation details after the Internal hire process. Can any one help us on this issue?

Thanks

Farook

entry.title: Re: Issue while connecting single S4 SAP system with 2 di...
entry.content:
If i am following your screenshot - i think your problem are the missing stars for Agency and Schema. If this won't work, i would try to not wildcard the interface name for test purpose - maybe this is not supported. 

But I know it's working - we had this a while during migration process from old PI 7.1 to new PI 7.5 - but i cannot recall the config unfortunately.

BR Helmut

entry.title: Re: I need to send an invoice in both Excel and CSV formats via email.

entry.title: Re: P2P controlling analysis in Sap Process Insights
entry.content:
Hello Guiseppe,

you can have a look into the Flow „PO item creation (with account assignment) to invoice“ (KPPURCH268) but don‘t have controlling details. For joint information purchasing & controlling you could look into single Performance Indicators „Overdue commitment items…“ (KFFI002003-05).

Or what is it that you are exactly looking for?

 

kind regards 

Volker

entry.title: Re: Where does the text for material group 1 to 5 is stored?
entry.content:
Hi,

it's TVM1T-TVM5T

 

Kind regards

Robert

entry.title: Can we replicate data from ABAP CDS View having input parameter through SDI(Smart Data Integration)
entry.content:
I am trying to replicate data from ABAP CDS view which is having input parameter to HANA DB through SDI (Smart Data Integration). We created remote source using ABAP Adapter in SAP HANA and created virtual table on top of it.

ABAP CDS View with Input Parameter(Document Number)

 

When we do SELECT on that virtual table we get below error.

When you add the virtual table in flowgraph, the document number input parameter is not coming up.

 

 

Is it possible to replicate data from ABAP CDS View using Flowgraph? If no, what are the options to replicate the data from parameterized ABAP CDS View to SAP HANA ?

 

@GNS @GNS1 

Thank You

Best Regards,

Ajinkya Jadhav

ABAP Development  SAP HANA smart data integration SAP Landscape Transformation replication server

entry.title: Re: High Latency (Geo Satellite Network) on HANA
entry.content: You should first try to optimize HANA performance like Data Compression, Parallel Processing, Network Optimization, Delta Merge, Data Partitioning... Use the of HANA built-in performance analysis tools to identify and resolve performance bottlenecks.

entry.title: Re: Import data from AWS S3 to HANA Cloud
entry.content: The certificate you need is the SSL certificate for the AWS S3 endpoint you are connecting to. This is not something you generate, but something provided by AWS.

entry.content:
What are the possible reasons for 'no data to retrieve' in a webi report?

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA DB - Transport/Package Custom Schema and underlying custom table
entry.content: Did you already try HALM? Transporting custom tables and schemas in SAP HANA DB can as I know be done using the SAP HANA Application Lifecycle Management (HALM) tool. This tool allows you to manage the lifecycle of SAP HANA database artifacts and applications.

Robert

entry.content:

you will need different packaging materials for SSCC internaly and externaly

entry.title: Re: Import data from AWS S3 to HANA Cloud
entry.content: ok but how to get it ?

entry.title: Re: DP Agent installation and configuration issues
entry.content:
Based on the error messages, it seems like there are issues with the network connection between the DP Agent and the HANA system.

You should be ensure, that the DP Agent server can reach the HANA system over the network. You can do this by pinging the HANA system from the DP Agent server. If the ping fails, there might be a network issue that needs to be resolved. Firewalls can sometimes block the necessary ports for the DP Agent to communicate with the HANA system. Ensure that the necessary ports are open on both the DP Agent server and the HANA system. Another point is to check the DP Agent is correctly configured to connect to the HANA system. This includes checking the HANA system's hostname, port, and credentials in the DP Agent configuration and the DP Agent logs can provide more detailed information about the issue. Look for any error messages in the logs that might indicate what the problem is.

entry.title: How to handle References in EHS Rule Editor
entry.content:
Hi All,

I try to build a rule which

  • check if a dedicated Reference is set
  • Replace this reference by a other one or
  • to delete the specific one, and set a new Reference

But I'm facing several problems, as there could be more then one Reference in ESTRR. All try's I did (also with ANY) did not succeed. Unfortunately the manual is not that helpful explaining how to handle those entries, so I hope someone has may an working example which explain how to work with this part.

entry.title: Generating E-way Bills under Bill to and Ship to Scenario
entry.content:
I have Scenario, Sold to party and Bill to party is from Hyderabad(A), Ship to party is in Maharashtra (B) And Plant is in Maharashtra (C). So invoice generated with IGST. But from GST side we are getting error as, 'For the Intra state transaction, IGST amount is not applicable; only CGST and SGST amount are applicable for the document.

So, I think it is the case of E-way Bills under Bill to and Ship to Scenario. Where  C create Invoice against the A, and A create Invoice against the B. So, How it is to be adopted in SAP. Also, help me if I am taking wrong understanding.

entry.title: Re: Asynchronous code execution using ABAP Cloud

entry.title: Temu DISCOUNT FLAT $100 OFF CODE {acu986007} or[acr690202] → For NEW Users
entry.content:
Currently, there is a FLAT $100 OFF Temu Discount code available: {acu986007} or[acr690202]. This code can be used by new users for a $100 discount on their purchase​. Make sure to apply the code at checkout to receive the discount.

For businesses operating in Brazil, navigating the complexities of tax regulations can be a challenge. A crucial aspect of this is complying with electronic invoicing, mandated by the Nota Fiscal Eletronica (NF-e) system. This article explores SAP Nota Fiscal Eletronica, a solution designed to simplify NF-e compliance for SAP users.

Understanding NF-e
NF-e refers to the electronic invoice format used in Brazil for transactions involving goods. It eliminates paper invoices, promoting tax efficiency and streamlining the invoicing process. Companies must generate NF-e in a specific XML format, containing details like buyer and seller information, product specifics, and tax data.

SAP Nota Fiscal Eletronica: A Helping Hand
SAP Nota Fiscal Eletronica is a software solution offered by SAP that aids businesses in complying with NF-e regulations. It integrates seamlessly with existing SAP systems, automating manual tasks and ensuring accurate invoice generation.

Key Benefits of SAP Nota Fiscal Eletronica
Enhanced Compliance: The solution automates NF-e generation in the mandated XML format, minimizing errors and ensuring compliance with Brazilian tax authorities (SEFAZ).
Streamlined Processes: Manual data entry for invoices is significantly reduced, saving time and resources.
Improved Accuracy: Automating invoice creation reduces the risk of errors associated with manual data entry.
Secure Communication: Secure and certified communication with SEFAZ is facilitated through the solution.
Efficiency Gains: Faster invoice processing translates to quicker settlements and improved cash flow.
Important Note: Upcoming End of Maintenance"

It's important to be aware that SAP Nota Fiscal Eletronica (SAP NFE) is an on-premise solution nearing its end-of-maintenance date (December 31, 2025). SAP recommends exploring alternative solutions to ensure continued compliance with evolving NF-e regulations.

entry.title: Re: out of memory while calling a procedure from xs job
entry.content:
The error message indicates that the procedure is trying to allocate more memory than is available. This could be due to the fact that the XS job and the SQL editor have different memory limits. When you run a procedure from the SQL editor, it is executed in the context of your user session, which might have a higher memory limit. When the procedure is run from an XS job, it is executed in the context of the XS engine, which might have a lower memory limit.

Try to reduce the amount of data that your procedure needs to process at once. This could involve breaking down the procedure into smaller parts, or using more efficient SQL queries but always test any changes in a controlled environment before applying them to your production system.

entry.title: Re: How to schedule application jobs from a RAP-based business object
entry.content:
Thanks @Andre_Fischer for this, I'm loving all the working example repos you have been posting, it's great being able to just pull them into our system so easily and try it all out. Also good seeing how you deal with the items not supported in abap git 🙂 

Cheers

Chris

entry.title: Is it possible to edit the description in the down payment request?
entry.content:
By mistake, wrong item description was maintained in the Down payment request. How can we modify the description here? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to edit the description in the down pa...
entry.content: If the status of the down payment request is posted, then the system will not allow to change the item description. As the status of the down payment request is posted (which means it is not paid yet) , this document can be deleted and create a fresh document with correct details.

entry.title: Removed extension while upgrade to 2211.24
entry.content:
hi team, 

 

we are now doing upgrade from DIGITS to DIGITS.24 (latest version) 

unfortunately, we aware that from DIGITS.24 , the extension 'sapproductconfigsomservices' and 'sapproductconfigsombol' are getting removed, and we do use it in the project, 

 

the way that we think about is to copy the entire extensions from DIGITS.23 into our repo in order to keep it, but we are not sure if this is a good idea, or is there any other new extension that we can use? how can we handle this case ?

 

thanks, 

Best


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Removed extension while upgrade to 2211.24
entry.content:
When an extension is deleted (de-released), it is removed from SAP Commerce and no longer shipped with the software. Components marked as deprecated continue to be maintained until they are deleted in a future release. You can continue to use an older release where they have not been deleted, however you may be prevented from deploying new builds of older versions once those versions are no longer supported in cloud environments. Please refer this help page for more details - https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_CLOUD_PUBLIC_CLOUD/12be4ac419604b01aabb1adeb2c4c8a2/8bb15ed586691014a948d1553f4947cf.html?locale=en-US&q=deprecation%20status

There is also this KBA that explains FAQs on the deprecation -SAP Commerce Cloud Accelerator Storefront Deprecation - FAQ

entry.title: No delivery-relevant items in order xxxx, order type ZNWO
entry.content:
No delivery-relevant items in order xxxx, order type ZNWO

Message No. VL455

Sale order created from va01

Delivery creation time getting the above errror.

already maintained plant, Shipping plant, from sale order.

entry.title: Re: Import data from AWS S3 to HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Please check, if this is working via Google Chrome:

1. Open web browser and navigate to your S3 bucket URL. It should be something like `https://s3.amazonaws.com/your-bucket-name`.
2. Click on the lock icon in the address bar, then click on "Certificate".
3. In the Certificate window, go to the "Details" tab and click on "Copy to File...".
4. Follow the Certificate Export Wizard to save the certificate as a .CER file.

Once you have the certificate, you can upload it to HANA Cloud PSE as described in the SAP HANA Cloud documentation.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Data Validations
entry.content:
Hello,

thank you for the detailed explanation!
A nice Feature if it's capabilitys increase and there are no Restricions.

Is it planned to make this Feature (that you did manually) a part of a Taskchain ? 
There is no Point in further increasing the Features of supported Checks if you have to do it manually for every View! No one will ever do that ;).

Any of your view's sources is not replicated to SAP Datasphere.

-> SAP always promotes that the Data has not to persisted again within the DSP.
How come that you release a Feature that does not support the Federate Approach ? 
Is this planned?

entry.title: Re: SAP GROUP REPORTING - CUSTOM CALCULATION FOR AMORTIZATION
entry.content: Could you provide the script? Reclassification rules or custom task could be an option depending on what you find in the script.
